case_title: SILVIA HERNANDEZ VS. KENNETH B BENDEL ET AL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,075.00 FILED BY HERNANDEZ, SILVIA AS TO DEFENDANT BENDEL, KENNETH B LACAYO, LEO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-09-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON BOTH DEFENDANTS. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANTS (2) WERE NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
